pwa.updateTitle: A new version of Zoora is available.
pwa.offlineReady: Zoora is ready to work offline.

install.title: Install the Zoora app
install.description: Add Zoora to your home screen for a fullscreen, faster experience that works offline.

ios.title: Add Zoora to your Home Screen
ios.description: Install straight from Safari in two quick steps.
ios.step1: Tap the Share button in Safari's toolbar.
ios.step2: Choose "Add to Home Screen", then tap Add.

comingSoon.subtitle: Zoora is a live video classroom built for teaching that actually feels alive — low-latency rooms, recordings, and tools made for educators. We are putting on the finishing touches.
comingSoon.consent: No spam. One email when we open the doors.
comingSoon.success: You're on the list. We'll be in touch.
comingSoon.footerNote: Crafted for teachers and their students.

hero.badge: Live classes, exams & messaging — one platform
hero.subtitle: Zoora brings low-latency live classrooms, airtight online exams, homework and grading, plus messaging that actually reaches students — all in one place.
hero.note: Free plan included — up and running in minutes.

features.title: One platform.
features.subtitle: Stop stitching together video calls, exam tools, and messaging apps. Zoora ships the entire teaching stack.

live.title: Live classrooms that feel alive
live.desc: Low-latency video rooms with raise-hand, live polls, participant moderation, and in-room chat — teaching stays interactive at any scale.

whiteboard.title: A whiteboard that keeps up
whiteboard.desc: Sketch, annotate, and explain on a collaborative whiteboard that saves with the room.

exams.title: Exams you can trust
exams.desc: Timed exams with shuffled questions and options, configurable negative marking, and a reusable question bank — cheating gets expensive.

homework.title: Homework to gradebook, closed loop
homework.desc: Assignments with submission windows, grading, attendance tracking, and a gradebook that fills itself.

recordings.title: Never lose a lesson
recordings.desc: Cloud recordings and offline rooms let students rewatch on their own schedule.

notifications.title: Messages that actually arrive
notifications.desc: Announcements delivered over Telegram, Bale, SMS, and web push — each with a delivery report.

how.title: From zero to live in three steps

step1.title: Create your space
step1.desc: Set up your organization with ready-made Manager, Teacher, and Student roles.

step2.title: Set up classes
step2.desc: Prepare sessions, question banks, and assignments — then invite your people.

step3.title: Go live and track
step3.desc: Teach and record; attendance and grades take care of themselves.

pricing.title: Plans that grow with your classroom
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when your classes do.
pricing.note: Plans are activated by our team — start free and upgrade when you're ready.

free.name: Free
free.tagline: Try Zoora with a small group

pro.name: Pro
pro.tagline: For schools and academies in full swing

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.tagline: For institutions that need it all

faq.title: What you want to know
faq.a1: Zoora is built for education — schools, academies, and private tutors — but any team that runs live sessions can use it.
faq.q2: Do students need to install anything?
faq.a2: No. Zoora runs in the browser, works on mobile, and can be installed as a PWA for a native-like experience.
faq.a3: Questions and options are shuffled per student, negative marking is configurable, and exams run in timed rooms. Advanced anti-cheat is available on Pro and above.
faq.a4: English and Persian with full right-to-left support. Switch anytime.
faq.a5: Through Telegram and Bale bots, SMS, and web push — each message with a delivery report.

cta.title: Your next class deserves better
cta.subtitle: Join Zoora and give your students a classroom that actually feels alive.

footer.note: Crafted for teachers and their students.

notFound.description: The page you're looking for isn't here. It may have been moved, ended, or never existed at all. Let's get you back to class.

serverError.title: We lost the signal
serverError.description: An unexpected error interrupted the session. Our team has been notified. You can try again, or head back to safe ground.

disableConfirm.title: Disable user
disableConfirm.description: {{name}} won't be able to log in or use the platform. Their data is kept and you can re-enable them later.

form.createDescription: Add a question to a bank.
form.optionsHint: For multiple-choice, give correct options a positive score. For short answer, list accepted values with their scores.

hints.choice: Add at least 2 options. Correct options get a positive score; distractors can be 0 or negative.
hints.short_answer: List accepted answers with a non-negative score each.
hints.descriptive: Add weighted rubric concepts the answer should mention — the suggested score is the sum of matched weights. Synonyms and a model answer improve the suggestion.

errors.choice: Choice questions need at least 2 options.
errors.shortAnswer: Short-answer questions need at least 1 option.
errors.descriptive: Descriptive questions need a maximum score.
errors.negative: Negative scores are only allowed for multiple-choice options.

negativeMark.label: Negative marking
negativeMark.perWrongHint: Each selected wrong option deducts this many points.
negativeMark.accumulativeHint: Every this-many wrong selections deducts 1 point (between 2 and 5).

max.array: The {{attribute}} field must not have more than {{max}} items.
